name: Rhine Swimming Basel
description: Join Basel's beloved summer tradition — float down the Rhine with a Wickelfisch dry bag.
longDescription: Rhine swimming is Basel's most cherished summer tradition. Thousands of locals float downstream in the clean, swift current using the iconic Wickelfisch — a waterproof bag shaped like a fish that keeps your belongings dry. Entry points at Tinguely Museum, Kleinbasel, or St. Johann Park.

providers.name: Free (Wickelfisch bag optional)
providers.description: Free swimming — Wickelfisch bags from CHF 20 at shops

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's biggest activities marketplace — verified suppliers, free cancellation
